subject: 56445NYMAD - East Quality Chargebacks - ME - 01/06/2025
preview: Dear Supplier - Your weekly MCB and All Sales reports for UNFI East region are attached. The report categories are listed below for your ref
body:
Dear Supplier -

 

Your weekly MCB and All Sales reports for UNFI East region are attached.   The report categories are listed below for your reference.

 

If you need to change the email address to which we send your reports, please email APVendorMaster@unfi.com with the words "Electronic MCB" noted in the subject line. 

Please note that we can send this automated email to multiple email addresses per supplier (remit number). 

If you would like to have an email address added to the distribution list, please notify APVendorMaster@unfi.com

 

MCB reports for the west region are not yet available in this format.  When they become available, you will be notified.

 

If you have a question about your report, please contact us at Deductions@unfi.com<mailto:Deductions@unfi.com>.

 

Thank you.

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 

[For deduction invoices starting with  “WE” (Weekly Chargeback East) or "SE" (Weekly Chargeback Select Nutrition]

Symbol

Name

Explanation

 

 

 

A

Arranged by Vendor

Customer specific discounts, submitted directly to UNFI by the supplier/broker.  This is for ongoing deals, EDLPs, CLPs, etc. 

C

Case stack

This is for any case stack deals sent to UNFI by the vendor and or broker.

D

Demo

This is for product used at store demos or samplings.

M

Miscellaneous

Misc. discounts or closeout orders.

N

Mass Market Opening Order/Placement

This category is for Supermarket accounts for new store openings and first time placement.

O

New Store Opening

This category is for new store openings for retail accounts.  These deals are sent to UNFI by the broker and or vendor.

P

Promos

This is for monthly promotions for a store or a chain of stores that are sent to UNFI by the broker or vendor.

S

Show Order

This is for any Show discounts authorized by the vendor or broker.  Typically 2 national shows (Expo West, Expo East) and UNFI Tabletop Shows

T

Broker Turnover

This category is for any turnover order discounts that are written by the broker on behalf of the manufacturer.

U

UNFI Event

These chargebacks are related to orders placed at UNFI events using the UNFI Show App technology which allows the supplier to independently enter order quantities and discounts.

V

Vendor Turnover

This category is for any turnover order discounts that are written by the manufacturer themselves due to the fact that they do not have any brokers working for them.

Z

Salesman Samples

UNFIs goal is to support the sales of your products through informed marketing, inside and outside sales teams.  Samples will be pulled from our inventory and billed back to the vendor.  Samples of regularly stocked items (not new products) may also be occasionally pulled from inventory, for the purpose of introducing your products to selected customers (supermarket, foodservice, chains) who do not currently stock your products.

 

 

 

 

 

 

[For deduction invoices starting with  “01ASM” (All Sales Chargeback East) or "02ASM" (All Sales Chargeback Select Nutrition]

Symbol

Name

Explanation

 

 

 

Circ

Circulars

UNFI circular program discounts.  Customers have to sign up to receive deals.

Nwsl

Newsletters

UNFI monthly specials program discounts.  Deals offered to every customer during promo period.

 

 

 

 

 

*Please note that this is a no-reply to email address.  Emails sent to this email address will not be received.

conversationSubject: UNFI Deductions Weekly Status Update for UNFI Remit #56445
subject: UNFI Deductions Weekly Status Update for UNFI Remit #56445
preview: Good Day, Attached is your Natural Deductions Dispute Weekly Status Update Report. This report is issued to keep our Suppliers up-to-date on
body:
Good Day,
Attached is your Natural Deductions Dispute Weekly Status Update Report.  This report is issued to keep our Suppliers up-to-date on the resolution of their formal disputes. This report provides Dispute Status, Dispute Resolution, Date Closed, Repayment Check # and Amount repaid if applicable; as well as A Invoice* information (*A Invoice: meaning an amended invoice was created for misshipped items or POs received short in error by our Warehouse). 

ALL of the below are now managed by our AP Department. These disputes will not be displayed on this report, nor will they receive a Tracking number from the Supplier Deduction Dispute Management Team. 
  • East & West Short Payments (meaning NO deduction was taken, the invoice was paid for less than was invoiced, etc.) 
  • East & West Prepaid Payments (invoices ending in PP) 
  •  East & West Cash Term/Payment Disputes 
  •  East & West Unpaid Invoices 
    Report Update We have updated the status information to help you better determine where your dispute is in the process, you will now see: 
    Dispute Received: for disputes that have been received but have not moved into research process 
    In Process of Being Reviewed: for disputes that are currently being researched. 
    Research Completed - Repayment Pending Approval: for disputes that have been researched and are being reviewed for accuracy of resolution. 
    Referred to AP for Resolution: for disputes that fall under our Accounts Payable Department for resolution. 
    Research Completed - New Invoice Requested: we are unable to use the documentation either received or on hand to complete a repayment and have requested you submit a new invoice for payment. 
    Repayment Approved: for disputes that have been approved for repayment, and 
    Research Completed - Repayment Denied: for disputes that have been denied repayment 

    You will also notice the following under check# and A Inv Repay CK#: 

    'UNPAID on Account' these are repayments that have been approved by the Supplier Deduction Dispute Resolution Team, but as of the date of this report the repayment has not been released to an outgoing payment to the Supplier. '(CK#)-Zero Check' these are repayments that have been approved by the Supplier Deduction Dispute Resolution Team and are on your AP account, but a check was not released by our AP Department. Please contact your AP Rep directly for further assistance on any Unpaid on Account or Zero Check payments. 

    We thank you for your continued patience and understanding as we strive to provide you with the most current information we have on your disputes, and to continue making progress with communications to you. If you have any questions, please email SupplierDeductionDisputeMgmt@unfi.com 

    Supplier Deduction Dispute Mgmt - Supplier Services 
    We continue to work outside of the office, please send all correspondence or questions to SupplierDeductionDisputeMgmt@unfi.com. 
    www.unfi.com

conversationSubject: UNFI Deductions Weekly Status Update for UNFI Remit #56445
subject: UNFI Deductions Weekly Status Update for UNFI Remit #56445
preview: Good Day, Attached is your Natural Deductions Dispute Weekly Status Update Report. This report is issued to keep our Suppliers up-to-date on
body:
Good Day,
Attached is your Natural Deductions Dispute Weekly Status Update Report.  This report is issued to keep our Suppliers up-to-date on the resolution of their formal disputes. This report provides Dispute Status, Dispute Resolution, Date Closed, Repayment Check # and Amount repaid if applicable; as well as A Invoice* information (*A Invoice: meaning an amended invoice was created for misshipped items or POs received short in error by our Warehouse). 

ALL of the below are now managed by our AP Department. These disputes will not be displayed on this report, nor will they receive a Tracking number from the Supplier Deduction Dispute Management Team. 
  • East & West Short Payments (meaning NO deduction was taken, the invoice was paid for less than was invoiced, etc.) 
  • East & West Prepaid Payments (invoices ending in PP) 
  •  East & West Cash Term/Payment Disputes 
  •  East & West Unpaid Invoices 
    Report Update We have updated the status information to help you better determine where your dispute is in the process, you will now see: 
    Dispute Received: for disputes that have been received but have not moved into research process 
    In Process of Being Reviewed: for disputes that are currently being researched. 
    Research Completed - Repayment Pending Approval: for disputes that have been researched and are being reviewed for accuracy of resolution. 
    Referred to AP for Resolution: for disputes that fall under our Accounts Payable Department for resolution. 
    Research Completed - New Invoice Requested: we are unable to use the documentation either received or on hand to complete a repayment and have requested you submit a new invoice for payment. 
    Repayment Approved: for disputes that have been approved for repayment, and 
    Research Completed - Repayment Denied: for disputes that have been denied repayment 

    You will also notice the following under check# and A Inv Repay CK#: 

    'UNPAID on Account' these are repayments that have been approved by the Supplier Deduction Dispute Resolution Team, but as of the date of this report the repayment has not been released to an outgoing payment to the Supplier. '(CK#)-Zero Check' these are repayments that have been approved by the Supplier Deduction Dispute Resolution Team and are on your AP account, but a check was not released by our AP Department. Please contact your AP Rep directly for further assistance on any Unpaid on Account or Zero Check payments. 

    We thank you for your continued patience and understanding as we strive to provide you with the most current information we have on your disputes, and to continue making progress with communications to you. If you have any questions, please email SupplierDeductionDisputeMgmt@unfi.com 

    Supplier Deduction Dispute Mgmt - Supplier Services 
    We continue to work outside of the office, please send all correspondence or questions to SupplierDeductionDisputeMgmt@unfi.com. 
    www.unfi.com

subject: 56445NYMAD - East Weekly Chargebacks - WE - 02/01/2025
preview: Dear Supplier - Your weekly MCB and All Sales reports for UNFI East region are attached. The report categories are listed below for your ref
body:
Dear Supplier -

 

Your weekly MCB and All Sales reports for UNFI East region are attached.   The report categories are listed below for your reference.

 

If you need to change the email address to which we send your reports, please email APVendorMaster@unfi.com with the words "Electronic MCB" noted in the subject line.

Please note that we can send this automated email to multiple email addresses per supplier (remit number).  If you would like to have an email address added to the distribution list, please notify APVendorMaster@unfi.com

 

MCB reports for the west region are not yet available in this format.  When they become available, you will be notified.

 

If you have a question about your report, please contact us at Deductions@unfi.com

 

Thank you.

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 

[For deduction invoices starting with  “WE” (Weekly Chargeback East) or "SE" (Weekly Chargeback Select Nutrition]

Symbol

Name

Explanation

 

 

 

A

Arranged by Vendor

Customer specific discounts, submitted directly to UNFI by the supplier/broker.  This is for ongoing deals, EDLPs, CLPs, etc. 

C

Case stack

This is for any case stack deals sent to UNFI by the vendor and or broker.

D

Demo

This is for product used at store demos or samplings.

M

Miscellaneous

Misc. discounts or closeout orders.

N

Mass Market Opening Order/Placement

This category is for Supermarket accounts for new store openings and first time placement.

O

New Store Opening

This category is for new store openings for retail accounts.  These deals are sent to UNFI by the broker and or vendor.

P

Promos

This is for monthly promotions for a store or a chain of stores that are sent to UNFI by the broker or vendor.

S

Show Order

This is for any Show discounts authorized by the vendor or broker.  Typically 2 national shows (Expo West, Expo East) and UNFI Tabletop Shows

T

Broker Turnover

This category is for any turnover order discounts that are written by the broker on behalf of the manufacturer.

U

UNFI Event

These chargebacks are related to orders placed at UNFI events using the UNFI Show App technology which allows the supplier to independently enter order quantities and discounts.

V

Vendor Turnover

This category is for any turnover order discounts that are written by the manufacturer themselves due to the fact that they do not have any brokers working for them.

Z

Salesman Samples

UNFIs goal is to support the sales of your products through informed marketing, inside and outside sales teams.  Samples will be pulled from our inventory and billed back to the vendor.  Samples of regularly stocked items (not new products) may also be occasionally pulled from inventory, for the purpose of introducing your products to selected customers (supermarket, foodservice, chains) who do not currently stock your products.

 

 

 

 

 

 

[For deduction invoices starting with  “01ASM” (All Sales Chargeback East) or "02ASM" (All Sales Chargeback Select Nutrition]

Symbol

Name

Explanation

 

 

 

Circ

Circulars

UNFI circular program discounts.  Customers have to sign up to receive deals.

Nwsl

Newsletters

UNFI monthly specials program discounts.  Deals offered to every customer during promo period.

 

 

 

 

 

*Please note that this is a no-reply to email address.  Emails sent to this email address will not be received.

subject: 56445NYMAD - East Weekly Chargebacks - WE - 03/01/2025
preview: Dear Supplier - Your weekly MCB and All Sales reports for UNFI East region are attached. The report categories are listed below for your ref
body:
Dear Supplier -

 

Your weekly MCB and All Sales reports for UNFI East region are attached.   The report categories are listed below for your reference.

 

If you need to change the email address to which we send your reports, please email APVendorMaster@unfi.com with the words "Electronic MCB" noted in the subject line.

Please note that we can send this automated email to multiple email addresses per supplier (remit number).  If you would like to have an email address added to the distribution list, please notify APVendorMaster@unfi.com

 

MCB reports for the west region are not yet available in this format.  When they become available, you will be notified.

 

If you have a question about your report, please contact us at Deductions@unfi.com

 

Thank you.

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 

[For deduction invoices starting with  “WE” (Weekly Chargeback East) or "SE" (Weekly Chargeback Select Nutrition]

Symbol

Name

Explanation

 

 

 

A

Arranged by Vendor

Customer specific discounts, submitted directly to UNFI by the supplier/broker.  This is for ongoing deals, EDLPs, CLPs, etc. 

C

Case stack

This is for any case stack deals sent to UNFI by the vendor and or broker.

D

Demo

This is for product used at store demos or samplings.

M

Miscellaneous

Misc. discounts or closeout orders.

N

Mass Market Opening Order/Placement

This category is for Supermarket accounts for new store openings and first time placement.

O

New Store Opening

This category is for new store openings for retail accounts.  These deals are sent to UNFI by the broker and or vendor.

P

Promos

This is for monthly promotions for a store or a chain of stores that are sent to UNFI by the broker or vendor.

S

Show Order

This is for any Show discounts authorized by the vendor or broker.  Typically 2 national shows (Expo West, Expo East) and UNFI Tabletop Shows

T

Broker Turnover

This category is for any turnover order discounts that are written by the broker on behalf of the manufacturer.

U

UNFI Event

These chargebacks are related to orders placed at UNFI events using the UNFI Show App technology which allows the supplier to independently enter order quantities and discounts.

V

Vendor Turnover

This category is for any turnover order discounts that are written by the manufacturer themselves due to the fact that they do not have any brokers working for them.

Z

Salesman Samples

UNFIs goal is to support the sales of your products through informed marketing, inside and outside sales teams.  Samples will be pulled from our inventory and billed back to the vendor.  Samples of regularly stocked items (not new products) may also be occasionally pulled from inventory, for the purpose of introducing your products to selected customers (supermarket, foodservice, chains) who do not currently stock your products.

 

 

 

 

 

 

[For deduction invoices starting with  “01ASM” (All Sales Chargeback East) or "02ASM" (All Sales Chargeback Select Nutrition]

Symbol

Name

Explanation

 

 

 

Circ

Circulars

UNFI circular program discounts.  Customers have to sign up to receive deals.

Nwsl

Newsletters

UNFI monthly specials program discounts.  Deals offered to every customer during promo period.

 

 

 

 

 

*Please note that this is a no-reply to email address.  Emails sent to this email address will not be received.

conversationSubject: UNFI Deductions Weekly Status Update for UNFI Remit #56445
subject: UNFI Deductions Weekly Status Update for UNFI Remit #56445
preview: Good Day, Attached is your Natural Deductions Dispute Weekly Status Update Report. This report is issued to keep our Suppliers up-to-date on
body:
Good Day,
Attached is your Natural Deductions Dispute Weekly Status Update Report.  This report is issued to keep our Suppliers up-to-date on the resolution of their formal disputes. This report provides Dispute Status, Dispute Resolution, Date Closed, Repayment Check # and Amount repaid if applicable; as well as A Invoice* information (*A Invoice: meaning an amended invoice was created for misshipped items or POs received short in error by our Warehouse). 

ALL of the below are now managed by our AP Department. These disputes will not be displayed on this report, nor will they receive a Tracking number from the Supplier Deduction Dispute Management Team. 
  • East & West Short Payments (meaning NO deduction was taken, the invoice was paid for less than was invoiced, etc.) 
  • East & West Prepaid Payments (invoices ending in PP) 
  •  East & West Cash Term/Payment Disputes 
  •  East & West Unpaid Invoices 
    Report Update We have updated the status information to help you better determine where your dispute is in the process, you will now see: 
    Dispute Received: for disputes that have been received but have not moved into research process 
    In Process of Being Reviewed: for disputes that are currently being researched. 
    Research Completed - Repayment Pending Approval: for disputes that have been researched and are being reviewed for accuracy of resolution. 
    Referred to AP for Resolution: for disputes that fall under our Accounts Payable Department for resolution. 
    Research Completed - New Invoice Requested: we are unable to use the documentation either received or on hand to complete a repayment and have requested you submit a new invoice for payment. 
    Repayment Approved: for disputes that have been approved for repayment, and 
    Research Completed - Repayment Denied: for disputes that have been denied repayment 

    You will also notice the following under check# and A Inv Repay CK#: 

    'UNPAID on Account' these are repayments that have been approved by the Supplier Deduction Dispute Resolution Team, but as of the date of this report the repayment has not been released to an outgoing payment to the Supplier. '(CK#)-Zero Check' these are repayments that have been approved by the Supplier Deduction Dispute Resolution Team and are on your AP account, but a check was not released by our AP Department. Please contact your AP Rep directly for further assistance on any Unpaid on Account or Zero Check payments. 

    We thank you for your continued patience and understanding as we strive to provide you with the most current information we have on your disputes, and to continue making progress with communications to you. If you have any questions, please email SupplierDeductionDisputeMgmt@unfi.com 

    Supplier Deduction Dispute Mgmt - Supplier Services 
    We continue to work outside of the office, please send all correspondence or questions to SupplierDeductionDisputeMgmt@unfi.com. 
    www.unfi.com

conversationSubject: UNFI Deductions Weekly Status Update for UNFI Remit #56445
subject: UNFI Deductions Weekly Status Update for UNFI Remit #56445
preview: Good Day, Attached is your Natural Deductions Dispute Weekly Status Update Report. This report is issued to keep our Suppliers up-to-date on
body:
Good Day,
Attached is your Natural Deductions Dispute Weekly Status Update Report.  This report is issued to keep our Suppliers up-to-date on the resolution of their formal disputes. This report provides Dispute Status, Dispute Resolution, Date Closed, Repayment Check # and Amount repaid if applicable; as well as A Invoice* information (*A Invoice: meaning an amended invoice was created for misshipped items or POs received short in error by our Warehouse). 

ALL of the below are now managed by our AP Department. These disputes will not be displayed on this report, nor will they receive a Tracking number from the Supplier Deduction Dispute Management Team. 
  • East & West Short Payments (meaning NO deduction was taken, the invoice was paid for less than was invoiced, etc.) 
  • East & West Prepaid Payments (invoices ending in PP) 
  •  East & West Cash Term/Payment Disputes 
  •  East & West Unpaid Invoices 
    Report Update We have updated the status information to help you better determine where your dispute is in the process, you will now see: 
    Dispute Received: for disputes that have been received but have not moved into research process 
    In Process of Being Reviewed: for disputes that are currently being researched. 
    Research Completed - Repayment Pending Approval: for disputes that have been researched and are being reviewed for accuracy of resolution. 
    Referred to AP for Resolution: for disputes that fall under our Accounts Payable Department for resolution. 
    Research Completed - New Invoice Requested: we are unable to use the documentation either received or on hand to complete a repayment and have requested you submit a new invoice for payment. 
    Repayment Approved: for disputes that have been approved for repayment, and 
    Research Completed - Repayment Denied: for disputes that have been denied repayment 

    You will also notice the following under check# and A Inv Repay CK#: 

    'UNPAID on Account' these are repayments that have been approved by the Supplier Deduction Dispute Resolution Team, but as of the date of this report the repayment has not been released to an outgoing payment to the Supplier. '(CK#)-Zero Check' these are repayments that have been approved by the Supplier Deduction Dispute Resolution Team and are on your AP account, but a check was not released by our AP Department. Please contact your AP Rep directly for further assistance on any Unpaid on Account or Zero Check payments. 

    We thank you for your continued patience and understanding as we strive to provide you with the most current information we have on your disputes, and to continue making progress with communications to you. If you have any questions, please email SupplierDeductionDisputeMgmt@unfi.com 

    Supplier Deduction Dispute Mgmt - Supplier Services 
    We continue to work outside of the office, please send all correspondence or questions to SupplierDeductionDisputeMgmt@unfi.com. 
    www.unfi.com

subject: 56445NYMAD - East Weekly Chargebacks - WE - 04/05/2025
preview: Dear Supplier - Your weekly MCB and All Sales reports for UNFI East region are attached. The report categories are listed below for your ref
body:
Dear Supplier -

 

Your weekly MCB and All Sales reports for UNFI East region are attached.   The report categories are listed below for your reference.

 

If you need to change the email address to which we send your reports, please email APVendorMaster@unfi.com with the words "Electronic MCB" noted in the subject line.

Please note that we can send this automated email to multiple email addresses per supplier (remit number).  If you would like to have an email address added to the distribution list, please notify APVendorMaster@unfi.com

 

MCB reports for the west region are not yet available in this format.  When they become available, you will be notified.

 

If you have a question about your report, please contact us at Deductions@unfi.com

 

Thank you.

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 

[For deduction invoices starting with  “WE” (Weekly Chargeback East) or "SE" (Weekly Chargeback Select Nutrition]

Symbol

Name

Explanation

 

 

 

A

Arranged by Vendor

Customer specific discounts, submitted directly to UNFI by the supplier/broker.  This is for ongoing deals, EDLPs, CLPs, etc. 

C

Case stack

This is for any case stack deals sent to UNFI by the vendor and or broker.

D

Demo

This is for product used at store demos or samplings.

M

Miscellaneous

Misc. discounts or closeout orders.

N

Mass Market Opening Order/Placement

This category is for Supermarket accounts for new store openings and first time placement.

O

New Store Opening

This category is for new store openings for retail accounts.  These deals are sent to UNFI by the broker and or vendor.

P

Promos

This is for monthly promotions for a store or a chain of stores that are sent to UNFI by the broker or vendor.

S

Show Order

This is for any Show discounts authorized by the vendor or broker.  Typically 2 national shows (Expo West, Expo East) and UNFI Tabletop Shows

T

Broker Turnover

This category is for any turnover order discounts that are written by the broker on behalf of the manufacturer.

U

UNFI Event

These chargebacks are related to orders placed at UNFI events using the UNFI Show App technology which allows the supplier to independently enter order quantities and discounts.

V

Vendor Turnover

This category is for any turnover order discounts that are written by the manufacturer themselves due to the fact that they do not have any brokers working for them.

Z

Salesman Samples

UNFIs goal is to support the sales of your products through informed marketing, inside and outside sales teams.  Samples will be pulled from our inventory and billed back to the vendor.  Samples of regularly stocked items (not new products) may also be occasionally pulled from inventory, for the purpose of introducing your products to selected customers (supermarket, foodservice, chains) who do not currently stock your products.

 

 

 

 

 

 

[For deduction invoices starting with  “01ASM” (All Sales Chargeback East) or "02ASM" (All Sales Chargeback Select Nutrition]

Symbol

Name

Explanation

 

 

 

Circ

Circulars

UNFI circular program discounts.  Customers have to sign up to receive deals.

Nwsl

Newsletters

UNFI monthly specials program discounts.  Deals offered to every customer during promo period.

 

 

 

 

 

*Please note that this is a no-reply to email address.  Emails sent to this email address will not be received.

subject: 56445NYMAD - East Weekly Chargebacks - WE - 04/19/2025
preview: Dear Supplier - Your weekly MCB and All Sales reports for UNFI East region are attached. The report categories are listed below for your ref
body:
Dear Supplier -

 

Your weekly MCB and All Sales reports for UNFI East region are attached.   The report categories are listed below for your reference.

 

If you need to change the email address to which we send your reports, please email APVendorMaster@unfi.com with the words "Electronic MCB" noted in the subject line.

Please note that we can send this automated email to multiple email addresses per supplier (remit number).  If you would like to have an email address added to the distribution list, please notify APVendorMaster@unfi.com

 

MCB reports for the west region are not yet available in this format.  When they become available, you will be notified.

 

If you have a question about your report, please contact us at Deductions@unfi.com

 

Thank you.

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 

[For deduction invoices starting with  “WE” (Weekly Chargeback East) or "SE" (Weekly Chargeback Select Nutrition]

Symbol

Name

Explanation

 

 

 

A

Arranged by Vendor

Customer specific discounts, submitted directly to UNFI by the supplier/broker.  This is for ongoing deals, EDLPs, CLPs, etc. 

C

Case stack

This is for any case stack deals sent to UNFI by the vendor and or broker.

D

Demo

This is for product used at store demos or samplings.

M

Miscellaneous

Misc. discounts or closeout orders.

N

Mass Market Opening Order/Placement

This category is for Supermarket accounts for new store openings and first time placement.

O

New Store Opening

This category is for new store openings for retail accounts.  These deals are sent to UNFI by the broker and or vendor.

P

Promos

This is for monthly promotions for a store or a chain of stores that are sent to UNFI by the broker or vendor.

S

Show Order

This is for any Show discounts authorized by the vendor or broker.  Typically 2 national shows (Expo West, Expo East) and UNFI Tabletop Shows

T

Broker Turnover

This category is for any turnover order discounts that are written by the broker on behalf of the manufacturer.

U

UNFI Event

These chargebacks are related to orders placed at UNFI events using the UNFI Show App technology which allows the supplier to independently enter order quantities and discounts.

V

Vendor Turnover

This category is for any turnover order discounts that are written by the manufacturer themselves due to the fact that they do not have any brokers working for them.

Z

Salesman Samples

UNFIs goal is to support the sales of your products through informed marketing, inside and outside sales teams.  Samples will be pulled from our inventory and billed back to the vendor.  Samples of regularly stocked items (not new products) may also be occasionally pulled from inventory, for the purpose of introducing your products to selected customers (supermarket, foodservice, chains) who do not currently stock your products.

 

 

 

 

 

 

[For deduction invoices starting with  “01ASM” (All Sales Chargeback East) or "02ASM" (All Sales Chargeback Select Nutrition]

Symbol

Name

Explanation

 

 

 

Circ

Circulars

UNFI circular program discounts.  Customers have to sign up to receive deals.

Nwsl

Newsletters

UNFI monthly specials program discounts.  Deals offered to every customer during promo period.

 

 

 

 

 

*Please note that this is a no-reply to email address.  Emails sent to this email address will not be received.

conversationSubject: Fwd: UNFI Deductions Weekly Status Update for UNFI Remit #56445
subject: UNFI Deductions Weekly Status Update for UNFI Remit #56445
preview: Good Day, Attached is your Natural Deductions Dispute Weekly Status Update Report. This report is issued to keep our Suppliers up-to-date on
body:
Good Day,
Attached is your Natural Deductions Dispute Weekly Status Update Report.  This report is issued to keep our Suppliers up-to-date on the resolution of their formal disputes. This report provides Dispute Status, Dispute Resolution, Date Closed, Repayment Check # and Amount repaid if applicable; as well as A Invoice* information (*A Invoice: meaning an amended invoice was created for misshipped items or POs received short in error by our Warehouse). 

ALL of the below are now managed by our AP Department. These disputes will not be displayed on this report, nor will they receive a Tracking number from the Supplier Deduction Dispute Management Team. 
  • East & West Short Payments (meaning NO deduction was taken, the invoice was paid for less than was invoiced, etc.) 
  • East & West Prepaid Payments (invoices ending in PP) 
  •  East & West Cash Term/Payment Disputes 
  •  East & West Unpaid Invoices 
    Report Update We have updated the status information to help you better determine where your dispute is in the process, you will now see: 
    Dispute Received: for disputes that have been received but have not moved into research process 
    In Process of Being Reviewed: for disputes that are currently being researched. 
    Research Completed - Repayment Pending Approval: for disputes that have been researched and are being reviewed for accuracy of resolution. 
    Referred to AP for Resolution: for disputes that fall under our Accounts Payable Department for resolution. 
    Research Completed - New Invoice Requested: we are unable to use the documentation either received or on hand to complete a repayment and have requested you submit a new invoice for payment. 
    Repayment Approved: for disputes that have been approved for repayment, and 
    Research Completed - Repayment Denied: for disputes that have been denied repayment 

    You will also notice the following under check# and A Inv Repay CK#: 

    'UNPAID on Account' these are repayments that have been approved by the Supplier Deduction Dispute Resolution Team, but as of the date of this report the repayment has not been released to an outgoing payment to the Supplier. '(CK#)-Zero Check' these are repayments that have been approved by the Supplier Deduction Dispute Resolution Team and are on your AP account, but a check was not released by our AP Department. Please contact your AP Rep directly for further assistance on any Unpaid on Account or Zero Check payments. 

    We thank you for your continued patience and understanding as we strive to provide you with the most current information we have on your disputes, and to continue making progress with communications to you. If you have any questions, please email SupplierDeductionDisputeMgmt@unfi.com 

    Supplier Deduction Dispute Mgmt - Supplier Services 
    We continue to work outside of the office, please send all correspondence or questions to SupplierDeductionDisputeMgmt@unfi.com. 
    www.unfi.com

subject: 56445NYMAD - East Weekly Chargebacks - WE - 05/10/2025
preview: Dear Supplier - Your weekly MCB and All Sales reports for UNFI East region are attached. The report categories are listed below for your ref
body:
Dear Supplier -

 

Your weekly MCB and All Sales reports for UNFI East region are attached.   The report categories are listed below for your reference.

 

If you need to change the email address to which we send your reports, please email APVendorMaster@unfi.com with the words "Electronic MCB" noted in the subject line.

Please note that we can send this automated email to multiple email addresses per supplier (remit number).  If you would like to have an email address added to the distribution list, please notify APVendorMaster@unfi.com

 

MCB reports for the west region are not yet available in this format.  When they become available, you will be notified.

 

If you have a question about your report, please contact us at Deductions@unfi.com

 

Thank you.

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 

[For deduction invoices starting with  “WE” (Weekly Chargeback East) or "SE" (Weekly Chargeback Select Nutrition]

Symbol

Name

Explanation

 

 

 

A

Arranged by Vendor

Customer specific discounts, submitted directly to UNFI by the supplier/broker.  This is for ongoing deals, EDLPs, CLPs, etc. 

C

Case stack

This is for any case stack deals sent to UNFI by the vendor and or broker.

D

Demo

This is for product used at store demos or samplings.

M

Miscellaneous

Misc. discounts or closeout orders.

N

Mass Market Opening Order/Placement

This category is for Supermarket accounts for new store openings and first time placement.

O

New Store Opening

This category is for new store openings for retail accounts.  These deals are sent to UNFI by the broker and or vendor.

P

Promos

This is for monthly promotions for a store or a chain of stores that are sent to UNFI by the broker or vendor.

S

Show Order

This is for any Show discounts authorized by the vendor or broker.  Typically 2 national shows (Expo West, Expo East) and UNFI Tabletop Shows

T

Broker Turnover

This category is for any turnover order discounts that are written by the broker on behalf of the manufacturer.

U

UNFI Event

These chargebacks are related to orders placed at UNFI events using the UNFI Show App technology which allows the supplier to independently enter order quantities and discounts.

V

Vendor Turnover

This category is for any turnover order discounts that are written by the manufacturer themselves due to the fact that they do not have any brokers working for them.

Z

Salesman Samples

UNFIs goal is to support the sales of your products through informed marketing, inside and outside sales teams.  Samples will be pulled from our inventory and billed back to the vendor.  Samples of regularly stocked items (not new products) may also be occasionally pulled from inventory, for the purpose of introducing your products to selected customers (supermarket, foodservice, chains) who do not currently stock your products.

 

 

 

 

 

 

[For deduction invoices starting with  “01ASM” (All Sales Chargeback East) or "02ASM" (All Sales Chargeback Select Nutrition]

Symbol

Name

Explanation

 

 

 

Circ

Circulars

UNFI circular program discounts.  Customers have to sign up to receive deals.

Nwsl

Newsletters

UNFI monthly specials program discounts.  Deals offered to every customer during promo period.

 

 

 

 

 

*Please note that this is a no-reply to email address.  Emails sent to this email address will not be received.

conversationSubject: Fwd: UNFI Deductions Weekly Status Update for UNFI Remit #56445
subject: UNFI Deductions Weekly Status Update for UNFI Remit #56445
preview: Good Day, Attached is your Natural Deductions Dispute Weekly Status Update Report. This report is issued to keep our Suppliers up-to-date on
body:
Good Day,
Attached is your Natural Deductions Dispute Weekly Status Update Report.  This report is issued to keep our Suppliers up-to-date on the resolution of their formal disputes. This report provides Dispute Status, Dispute Resolution, Date Closed, Repayment Check # and Amount repaid if applicable; as well as A Invoice* information (*A Invoice: meaning an amended invoice was created for misshipped items or POs received short in error by our Warehouse). 

ALL of the below are now managed by our AP Department. These disputes will not be displayed on this report, nor will they receive a Tracking number from the Supplier Deduction Dispute Management Team. 
  • East & West Short Payments (meaning NO deduction was taken, the invoice was paid for less than was invoiced, etc.) 
  • East & West Prepaid Payments (invoices ending in PP) 
  •  East & West Cash Term/Payment Disputes 
  •  East & West Unpaid Invoices 
    Report Update We have updated the status information to help you better determine where your dispute is in the process, you will now see: 
    Dispute Received: for disputes that have been received but have not moved into research process 
    In Process of Being Reviewed: for disputes that are currently being researched. 
    Research Completed - Repayment Pending Approval: for disputes that have been researched and are being reviewed for accuracy of resolution. 
    Referred to AP for Resolution: for disputes that fall under our Accounts Payable Department for resolution. 
    Research Completed - New Invoice Requested: we are unable to use the documentation either received or on hand to complete a repayment and have requested you submit a new invoice for payment. 
    Repayment Approved: for disputes that have been approved for repayment, and 
    Research Completed - Repayment Denied: for disputes that have been denied repayment 

    You will also notice the following under check# and A Inv Repay CK#: 

    'UNPAID on Account' these are repayments that have been approved by the Supplier Deduction Dispute Resolution Team, but as of the date of this report the repayment has not been released to an outgoing payment to the Supplier. '(CK#)-Zero Check' these are repayments that have been approved by the Supplier Deduction Dispute Resolution Team and are on your AP account, but a check was not released by our AP Department. Please contact your AP Rep directly for further assistance on any Unpaid on Account or Zero Check payments. 

    We thank you for your continued patience and understanding as we strive to provide you with the most current information we have on your disputes, and to continue making progress with communications to you. If you have any questions, please email SupplierDeductionDisputeMgmt@unfi.com 

    Supplier Deduction Dispute Mgmt - Supplier Services 
    We continue to work outside of the office, please send all correspondence or questions to SupplierDeductionDisputeMgmt@unfi.com. 
    www.unfi.com

conversationSubject: Fwd: UNFI Deductions Weekly Status Update for UNFI Remit #56445
subject: UNFI Deductions Weekly Status Update for UNFI Remit #56445
preview: Good Day, Attached is your Natural Deductions Dispute Weekly Status Update Report. This report is issued to keep our Suppliers up-to-date on
body:
Good Day,
Attached is your Natural Deductions Dispute Weekly Status Update Report.  This report is issued to keep our Suppliers up-to-date on the resolution of their formal disputes. This report provides Dispute Status, Dispute Resolution, Date Closed, Repayment Check # and Amount repaid if applicable; as well as A Invoice* information (*A Invoice: meaning an amended invoice was created for misshipped items or POs received short in error by our Warehouse). 

ALL of the below are now managed by our AP Department. These disputes will not be displayed on this report, nor will they receive a Tracking number from the Supplier Deduction Dispute Management Team. 
  • East & West Short Payments (meaning NO deduction was taken, the invoice was paid for less than was invoiced, etc.) 
  • East & West Prepaid Payments (invoices ending in PP) 
  •  East & West Cash Term/Payment Disputes 
  •  East & West Unpaid Invoices 
    Report Update We have updated the status information to help you better determine where your dispute is in the process, you will now see: 
    Dispute Received: for disputes that have been received but have not moved into research process 
    In Process of Being Reviewed: for disputes that are currently being researched. 
    Research Completed - Repayment Pending Approval: for disputes that have been researched and are being reviewed for accuracy of resolution. 
    Referred to AP for Resolution: for disputes that fall under our Accounts Payable Department for resolution. 
    Research Completed - New Invoice Requested: we are unable to use the documentation either received or on hand to complete a repayment and have requested you submit a new invoice for payment. 
    Repayment Approved: for disputes that have been approved for repayment, and 
    Research Completed - Repayment Denied: for disputes that have been denied repayment 

    You will also notice the following under check# and A Inv Repay CK#: 

    'UNPAID on Account' these are repayments that have been approved by the Supplier Deduction Dispute Resolution Team, but as of the date of this report the repayment has not been released to an outgoing payment to the Supplier. '(CK#)-Zero Check' these are repayments that have been approved by the Supplier Deduction Dispute Resolution Team and are on your AP account, but a check was not released by our AP Department. Please contact your AP Rep directly for further assistance on any Unpaid on Account or Zero Check payments. 

    We thank you for your continued patience and understanding as we strive to provide you with the most current information we have on your disputes, and to continue making progress with communications to you. If you have any questions, please email SupplierDeductionDisputeMgmt@unfi.com 

    Supplier Deduction Dispute Mgmt - Supplier Services 
    We continue to work outside of the office, please send all correspondence or questions to SupplierDeductionDisputeMgmt@unfi.com. 
    www.unfi.com

    Research Completed - Repayment Pending Approval: for disputes that have been researched and are being reviewed for accuracy of resolution. 
    Referred to AP for Resolution: for disputes that fall under our Accounts Payable Department for resolution. 
    Research Completed - New Invoice Requested: we are unable to use the documentation either received or on hand to complete a repayment and have requested you submit a new invoice for payment. 
    Repayment Approved: for disputes that have been approved for repayment, and 
    Research Completed - Repayment Denied: for disputes that have been denied repayment 

    You will also notice the following under check# and A Inv Repay CK#: 

    'UNPAID on Account' these are repayments that have been approved by the Supplier Deduction Dispute Resolution Team, but as of the date of this report the repayment has not been released to an outgoing payment to the Supplier. '(CK#)-Zero Check' these are repayments that have been approved by the Supplier Deduction Dispute Resolution Team and are on your AP account, but a check was not released by our AP Department. Please contact your AP Rep directly for further assistance on any Unpaid on Account or Zero Check payments. 

    We thank you for your continued patience and understanding as we strive to provide you with the most current information we have on your disputes, and to continue making progress with communications to you. If you have any questions, please email SupplierDeductionDisputeMgmt@unfi.com

body:
Good Day,
Attached is your Natural Deductions Dispute Weekly Status Update Report.  This report is issued to keep our Suppliers up-to-date on the resolution of their formal disputes. This report provides Dispute Status, Dispute Resolution, Date Closed, Repayment Check # and Amount repaid if applicable; as well as A Invoice* information (*A Invoice: meaning an amended invoice was created for misshipped items or POs received short in error by our Warehouse). 

ALL of the below are now managed by our AP Department. These disputes will not be displayed on this report, nor will they receive a Tracking number from the Supplier Deduction Dispute Management Team. 
  • East & West Short Payments (meaning NO deduction was taken, the invoice was paid for less than was invoiced, etc.) 
  • East & West Prepaid Payments (invoices ending in PP) 
  •  East & West Cash Term/Payment Disputes 
  •  East & West Unpaid Invoices 
    Report Update We have updated the status information to help you better determine where your dispute is in the process, you will now see: 
    Dispute Received: for disputes that have been received but have not moved into research process 
    In Process of Being Reviewed: for disputes that are currently being researched. 
    Research Completed - Repayment Pending Approval: for disputes that have been researched and are being reviewed for accuracy of resolution. 
    Referred to AP for Resolution: for disputes that fall under our Accounts Payable Department for resolution. 
    Research Completed - New Invoice Requested: we are unable to use the documentation either received or on hand to complete a repayment and have requested you submit a new invoice for payment. 
    Repayment Approved: for disputes that have been approved for repayment, and 
    Research Completed - Repayment Denied: for disputes that have been denied repayment 

    You will also notice the following under check# and A Inv Repay CK#: 

    'UNPAID on Account' these are repayments that have been approved by the Supplier Deduction Dispute Resolution Team, but as of the date of this report the repayment has not been released to an outgoing payment to the Supplier. '(CK#)-Zero Check' these are repayments that have been approved by the Supplier Deduction Dispute Resolution Team and are on your AP account, but a check was not released by our AP Department. Please contact your AP Rep directly for further assistance on any Unpaid on Account or Zero Check payments. 

    We thank you for your continued patience and understanding as we strive to provide you with the most current information we have on your disputes, and to continue making progress with communications to you. If you have any questions, please email SupplierDeductionDisputeMgmt@unfi.com 

    Supplier Deduction Dispute Mgmt - Supplier Services 
    We continue to work outside of the office, please send all correspondence or questions to SupplierDeductionDisputeMgmt@unfi.com. 
    www.unfi.com

subject: 56445NYMAD - East Weekly Chargebacks - WE - 07/12/2025
preview: Dear Supplier - Your weekly MCB and All Sales reports for UNFI East region are attached. The report categories are listed below for your ref
body:
Dear Supplier -

 

Your weekly MCB and All Sales reports for UNFI East region are attached.   The report categories are listed below for your reference.

 

If you need to change the email address to which we send your reports, please email APVendorMaster@unfi.com with the words "Electronic MCB" noted in the subject line.

Please note that we can send this automated email to multiple email addresses per supplier (remit number).  If you would like to have an email address added to the distribution list, please notify APVendorMaster@unfi.com

 

MCB reports for the west region are not yet available in this format.  When they become available, you will be notified.

 

If you have a question about your report, please contact us at Deductions@unfi.com

 

Thank you.

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 

[For deduction invoices starting with  “WE” (Weekly Chargeback East) or "SE" (Weekly Chargeback Select Nutrition]

Symbol

Name

Explanation

 

 

 

A

Arranged by Vendor

Customer specific discounts, submitted directly to UNFI by the supplier/broker.  This is for ongoing deals, EDLPs, CLPs, etc. 

C

Case stack

This is for any case stack deals sent to UNFI by the vendor and or broker.

D

Demo

This is for product used at store demos or samplings.

M

Miscellaneous

Misc. discounts or closeout orders.

N

Mass Market Opening Order/Placement

This category is for Supermarket accounts for new store openings and first time placement.

O

New Store Opening

This category is for new store openings for retail accounts.  These deals are sent to UNFI by the broker and or vendor.

P

Promos

This is for monthly promotions for a store or a chain of stores that are sent to UNFI by the broker or vendor.

S

Show Order

This is for any Show discounts authorized by the vendor or broker.  Typically 2 national shows (Expo West, Expo East) and UNFI Tabletop Shows

T

Broker Turnover

This category is for any turnover order discounts that are written by the broker on behalf of the manufacturer.

U

UNFI Event

These chargebacks are related to orders placed at UNFI events using the UNFI Show App technology which allows the supplier to independently enter order quantities and discounts.

V

Vendor Turnover

This category is for any turnover order discounts that are written by the manufacturer themselves due to the fact that they do not have any brokers working for them.

Z

Salesman Samples

UNFIs goal is to support the sales of your products through informed marketing, inside and outside sales teams.  Samples will be pulled from our inventory and billed back to the vendor.  Samples of regularly stocked items (not new products) may also be occasionally pulled from inventory, for the purpose of introducing your products to selected customers (supermarket, foodservice, chains) who do not currently stock your products.

 

 

 

 

 

 

[For deduction invoices starting with  “01ASM” (All Sales Chargeback East) or "02ASM" (All Sales Chargeback Select Nutrition]

Symbol

Name

Explanation

 

 

 

Circ

Circulars

UNFI circular program discounts.  Customers have to sign up to receive deals.

Nwsl

Newsletters

UNFI monthly specials program discounts.  Deals offered to every customer during promo period.

 

 

 

 

 

*Please note that this is a no-reply to email address.  Emails sent to this email address will not be received.

    'UNPAID on Account' these are repayments that have been approved by the Supplier Deduction Dispute Resolution Team, but as of the date of this report the repayment has not been released to an outgoing payment to the Supplier. '(CK#)-Zero Check' these are repayments that have been approved by the Supplier Deduction Dispute Resolution Team and are on your AP account, but a check was not released by our AP Department. Please contact your AP Rep directly for further assistance on any Unpaid on Account or Zero Check payments. 

    We thank you for your continued patience and understanding as we strive to provide you with the most current information we have on your disputes, and to continue making progress with communications to you. If you have any questions, please email SupplierDeductionDisputeMgmt@unfi.com

subject: 56445NYMAD - East Quality Chargebacks - ME - 08/04/2025
preview: Dear Supplier - Your weekly MCB and All Sales reports for UNFI East region are attached. The report categories are listed below for your ref
body:
Dear Supplier -

 

Your weekly MCB and All Sales reports for UNFI East region are attached.   The report categories are listed below for your reference.

 

If you need to change the email address to which we send your reports, please email APVendorMaster@unfi.com with the words "Electronic MCB" noted in the subject line. 

Please note that we can send this automated email to multiple email addresses per supplier (remit number). 

If you would like to have an email address added to the distribution list, please notify APVendorMaster@unfi.com

 

MCB reports for the west region are not yet available in this format.  When they become available, you will be notified.

 

If you have a question about your report, please contact us at Deductions@unfi.com<mailto:Deductions@unfi.com>.

 

Thank you.

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 

[For deduction invoices starting with  “WE” (Weekly Chargeback East) or "SE" (Weekly Chargeback Select Nutrition]

Symbol

Name

Explanation

 

 

 

A

Arranged by Vendor

Customer specific discounts, submitted directly to UNFI by the supplier/broker.  This is for ongoing deals, EDLPs, CLPs, etc. 

C

Case stack

This is for any case stack deals sent to UNFI by the vendor and or broker.

D

Demo

This is for product used at store demos or samplings.

M

Miscellaneous

Misc. discounts or closeout orders.

N

Mass Market Opening Order/Placement

This category is for Supermarket accounts for new store openings and first time placement.

O

New Store Opening

This category is for new store openings for retail accounts.  These deals are sent to UNFI by the broker and or vendor.

P

Promos

This is for monthly promotions for a store or a chain of stores that are sent to UNFI by the broker or vendor.

S

Show Order

This is for any Show discounts authorized by the vendor or broker.  Typically 2 national shows (Expo West, Expo East) and UNFI Tabletop Shows

T

Broker Turnover

This category is for any turnover order discounts that are written by the broker on behalf of the manufacturer.

U

UNFI Event

These chargebacks are related to orders placed at UNFI events using the UNFI Show App technology which allows the supplier to independently enter order quantities and discounts.

V

Vendor Turnover

This category is for any turnover order discounts that are written by the manufacturer themselves due to the fact that they do not have any brokers working for them.

Z

Salesman Samples

UNFIs goal is to support the sales of your products through informed marketing, inside and outside sales teams.  Samples will be pulled from our inventory and billed back to the vendor.  Samples of regularly stocked items (not new products) may also be occasionally pulled from inventory, for the purpose of introducing your products to selected customers (supermarket, foodservice, chains) who do not currently stock your products.

 

 

 

 

 

 

[For deduction invoices starting with  “01ASM” (All Sales Chargeback East) or "02ASM" (All Sales Chargeback Select Nutrition]

Symbol

Name

Explanation

 

 

 

Circ

Circulars

UNFI circular program discounts.  Customers have to sign up to receive deals.

Nwsl

Newsletters

UNFI monthly specials program discounts.  Deals offered to every customer during promo period.

 

 

 

 

 

*Please note that this is a no-reply to email address.  Emails sent to this email address will not be received.

subject: UNFI Deductions Weekly Status Update for UNFI Remit #56445
preview: Good Day, Attached is your Natural Deductions Dispute Weekly Status Update Report. This report is issued to keep our Suppliers up-to-date on
body:
Good Day,
Attached is your Natural Deductions Dispute Weekly Status Update Report.  This report is issued to keep our Suppliers up-to-date on the resolution of their formal disputes. This report provides Dispute Status, Dispute Resolution, Date Closed, Repayment Check # and Amount repaid if applicable; as well as A Invoice* information (*A Invoice: meaning an amended invoice was created for misshipped items or POs received short in error by our Warehouse). 

ALL of the below are now managed by our AP Department. These disputes will not be displayed on this report, nor will they receive a Tracking number from the Supplier Deduction Dispute Management Team. 
  • East & West Short Payments (meaning NO deduction was taken, the invoice was paid for less than was invoiced, etc.) 
  • East & West Prepaid Payments (invoices ending in PP) 
  •  East & West Cash Term/Payment Disputes 
  •  East & West Unpaid Invoices 
    Report Update We have updated the status information to help you better determine where your dispute is in the process, you will now see: 
    Dispute Received: for disputes that have been received but have not moved into research process 
    In Process of Being Reviewed: for disputes that are currently being researched. 
    Research Completed - Repayment Pending Approval: for disputes that have been researched and are being reviewed for accuracy of resolution. 
    Referred to AP for Resolution: for disputes that fall under our Accounts Payable Department for resolution. 
    Research Completed - New Invoice Requested: we are unable to use the documentation either received or on hand to complete a repayment and have requested you submit a new invoice for payment. 
    Repayment Approved: for disputes that have been approved for repayment, and 
    Research Completed - Repayment Denied: for disputes that have been denied repayment 

    You will also notice the following under check# and A Inv Repay CK#: 

    'UNPAID on Account' these are repayments that have been approved by the Supplier Deduction Dispute Resolution Team, but as of the date of this report the repayment has not been released to an outgoing payment to the Supplier. '(CK#)-Zero Check' these are repayments that have been approved by the Supplier Deduction Dispute Resolution Team and are on your AP account, but a check was not released by our AP Department. Please contact your AP Rep directly for further assistance on any Unpaid on Account or Zero Check payments. 

    We thank you for your continued patience and understanding as we strive to provide you with the most current information we have on your disputes, and to continue making progress with communications to you. If you have any questions, please email SupplierDeductionDisputeMgmt@unfi.com 

    Supplier Deduction Dispute Mgmt - Supplier Services 
    We continue to work outside of the office, please send all correspondence or questions to SupplierDeductionDisputeMgmt@unfi.com. 
    www.unfi.com

    Research Completed - Repayment Pending Approval: for disputes that have been researched and are being reviewed for accuracy of resolution. 
    Referred to AP for Resolution: for disputes that fall under our Accounts Payable Department for resolution. 
    Research Completed - New Invoice Requested: we are unable to use the documentation either received or on hand to complete a repayment and have requested you submit a new invoice for payment. 
    Repayment Approved: for disputes that have been approved for repayment, and 
    Research Completed - Repayment Denied: for disputes that have been denied repayment 

    You will also notice the following under check# and A Inv Repay CK#: 

    'UNPAID on Account' these are repayments that have been approved by the Supplier Deduction Dispute Resolution Team, but as of the date of this report the repayment has not been released to an outgoing payment to the Supplier. '(CK#)-Zero Check' these are repayments that have been approved by the Supplier Deduction Dispute Resolution Team and are on your AP account, but a check was not released by our AP Department. Please contact your AP Rep directly for further assistance on any Unpaid on Account or Zero Check payments. 

    We thank you for your continued patience and understanding as we strive to provide you with the most current information we have on your disputes, and to continue making progress with communications to you. If you have any questions, please email SupplierDeductionDisputeMgmt@unfi.com 

    Supplier Deduction Dispute Mgmt - Supplier Services 
    We continue to work outside of the office, please send all correspondence or questions to SupplierDeductionDisputeMgmt@unfi.com. 
    www.unfi.com

subject: 56445NYMAD - East Weekly Chargebacks - WE - 08/23/2025
preview: Dear Supplier - Your weekly MCB and All Sales reports for UNFI East region are attached. The report categories are listed below for your ref
body:
Dear Supplier -

 

Your weekly MCB and All Sales reports for UNFI East region are attached.   The report categories are listed below for your reference.

 

If you need to change the email address to which we send your reports, please email APVendorMaster@unfi.com with the words "Electronic MCB" noted in the subject line.

Please note that we can send this automated email to multiple email addresses per supplier (remit number).  If you would like to have an email address added to the distribution list, please notify APVendorMaster@unfi.com

 

MCB reports for the west region are not yet available in this format.  When they become available, you will be notified.

 

If you have a question about your report, please contact us at Deductions@unfi.com

 

Thank you.

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 

[For deduction invoices starting with  “WE” (Weekly Chargeback East) or "SE" (Weekly Chargeback Select Nutrition]

Symbol

Name

Explanation

 

 

 

A

Arranged by Vendor

Customer specific discounts, submitted directly to UNFI by the supplier/broker.  This is for ongoing deals, EDLPs, CLPs, etc. 

C

Case stack

This is for any case stack deals sent to UNFI by the vendor and or broker.

D

Demo

This is for product used at store demos or samplings.

M

Miscellaneous

Misc. discounts or closeout orders.

N

Mass Market Opening Order/Placement

This category is for Supermarket accounts for new store openings and first time placement.

O

New Store Opening

This category is for new store openings for retail accounts.  These deals are sent to UNFI by the broker and or vendor.

P

Promos

This is for monthly promotions for a store or a chain of stores that are sent to UNFI by the broker or vendor.

S

Show Order

This is for any Show discounts authorized by the vendor or broker.  Typically 2 national shows (Expo West, Expo East) and UNFI Tabletop Shows

T

Broker Turnover

This category is for any turnover order discounts that are written by the broker on behalf of the manufacturer.

U

UNFI Event

These chargebacks are related to orders placed at UNFI events using the UNFI Show App technology which allows the supplier to independently enter order quantities and discounts.

V

Vendor Turnover

This category is for any turnover order discounts that are written by the manufacturer themselves due to the fact that they do not have any brokers working for them.

Z

Salesman Samples

UNFIs goal is to support the sales of your products through informed marketing, inside and outside sales teams.  Samples will be pulled from our inventory and billed back to the vendor.  Samples of regularly stocked items (not new products) may also be occasionally pulled from inventory, for the purpose of introducing your products to selected customers (supermarket, foodservice, chains) who do not currently stock your products.

 

 

 

 

 

 

[For deduction invoices starting with  “01ASM” (All Sales Chargeback East) or "02ASM" (All Sales Chargeback Select Nutrition]

Symbol

Name

Explanation

 

 

 

Circ

Circulars

UNFI circular program discounts.  Customers have to sign up to receive deals.

Nwsl

Newsletters

UNFI monthly specials program discounts.  Deals offered to every customer during promo period.

 

 

 

 

 

*Please note that this is a no-reply to email address.  Emails sent to this email address will not be received.

body:
Good Day,
Attached is your Natural Deductions Dispute Weekly Status Update Report.  This report is issued to keep our Suppliers up-to-date on the resolution of their formal disputes. This report provides Dispute Status, Dispute Resolution, Date Closed, Repayment Check # and Amount repaid if applicable; as well as A Invoice* information (*A Invoice: meaning an amended invoice was created for misshipped items or POs received short in error by our Warehouse). 

ALL of the below are now managed by our AP Department. These disputes will not be displayed on this report, nor will they receive a Tracking number from the Supplier Deduction Dispute Management Team. 
  • East & West Short Payments (meaning NO deduction was taken, the invoice was paid for less than was invoiced, etc.) 
  • East & West Prepaid Payments (invoices ending in PP) 
  •  East & West Cash Term/Payment Disputes 
  •  East & West Unpaid Invoices 
    Report Update We have updated the status information to help you better determine where your dispute is in the process, you will now see: 
    Dispute Received: for disputes that have been received but have not moved into research process 
    In Process of Being Reviewed: for disputes that are currently being researched. 
    Research Completed - Repayment Pending Approval: for disputes that have been researched and are being reviewed for accuracy of resolution. 
    Referred to AP for Resolution: for disputes that fall under our Accounts Payable Department for resolution. 
    Research Completed - New Invoice Requested: we are unable to use the documentation either received or on hand to complete a repayment and have requested you submit a new invoice for payment. 
    Repayment Approved: for disputes that have been approved for repayment, and 
    Research Completed - Repayment Denied: for disputes that have been denied repayment 

    You will also notice the following under check# and A Inv Repay CK#: 

    'UNPAID on Account' these are repayments that have been approved by the Supplier Deduction Dispute Resolution Team, but as of the date of this report the repayment has not been released to an outgoing payment to the Supplier. '(CK#)-Zero Check' these are repayments that have been approved by the Supplier Deduction Dispute Resolution Team and are on your AP account, but a check was not released by our AP Department. Please contact your AP Rep directly for further assistance on any Unpaid on Account or Zero Check payments. 

    We thank you for your continued patience and understanding as we strive to provide you with the most current information we have on your disputes, and to continue making progress with communications to you. If you have any questions, please email SupplierDeductionDisputeMgmt@unfi.com 

    Supplier Deduction Dispute Mgmt - Supplier Services 
    We continue to work outside of the office, please send all correspondence or questions to SupplierDeductionDisputeMgmt@unfi.com. 
    www.unfi.com

subject: 56445NYMAD - East Weekly Chargebacks - WE - 09/13/2025
preview: Dear Supplier - Your weekly MCB and All Sales reports for UNFI East region are attached. The report categories are listed below for your ref
body:
Dear Supplier -

 

Your weekly MCB and All Sales reports for UNFI East region are attached.   The report categories are listed below for your reference.

 

If you need to change the email address to which we send your reports, please email APVendorMaster@unfi.com with the words "Electronic MCB" noted in the subject line.

Please note that we can send this automated email to multiple email addresses per supplier (remit number).  If you would like to have an email address added to the distribution list, please notify APVendorMaster@unfi.com

 

MCB reports for the west region are not yet available in this format.  When they become available, you will be notified.

 

If you have a question about your report, please contact us at Deductions@unfi.com

 

Thank you.

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 

[For deduction invoices starting with  “WE” (Weekly Chargeback East) or "SE" (Weekly Chargeback Select Nutrition]

Symbol

Name

Explanation

 

 

 

A

Arranged by Vendor

Customer specific discounts, submitted directly to UNFI by the supplier/broker.  This is for ongoing deals, EDLPs, CLPs, etc. 

C

Case stack

This is for any case stack deals sent to UNFI by the vendor and or broker.

D

Demo

This is for product used at store demos or samplings.

M

Miscellaneous

Misc. discounts or closeout orders.

N

Mass Market Opening Order/Placement

This category is for Supermarket accounts for new store openings and first time placement.

O

New Store Opening

This category is for new store openings for retail accounts.  These deals are sent to UNFI by the broker and or vendor.

P

Promos

This is for monthly promotions for a store or a chain of stores that are sent to UNFI by the broker or vendor.

S

Show Order

This is for any Show discounts authorized by the vendor or broker.  Typically 2 national shows (Expo West, Expo East) and UNFI Tabletop Shows

T

Broker Turnover

This category is for any turnover order discounts that are written by the broker on behalf of the manufacturer.

U

UNFI Event

These chargebacks are related to orders placed at UNFI events using the UNFI Show App technology which allows the supplier to independently enter order quantities and discounts.

V

Vendor Turnover

This category is for any turnover order discounts that are written by the manufacturer themselves due to the fact that they do not have any brokers working for them.

Z

Salesman Samples

UNFIs goal is to support the sales of your products through informed marketing, inside and outside sales teams.  Samples will be pulled from our inventory and billed back to the vendor.  Samples of regularly stocked items (not new products) may also be occasionally pulled from inventory, for the purpose of introducing your products to selected customers (supermarket, foodservice, chains) who do not currently stock your products.

 

 

 

 

 

 

[For deduction invoices starting with  “01ASM” (All Sales Chargeback East) or "02ASM" (All Sales Chargeback Select Nutrition]

Symbol

Name

Explanation

 

 

 

Circ

Circulars

UNFI circular program discounts.  Customers have to sign up to receive deals.

Nwsl

Newsletters

UNFI monthly specials program discounts.  Deals offered to every customer during promo period.

 

 

 

 

 

*Please note that this is a no-reply to email address.  Emails sent to this email address will not be received.

conversationSubject: Fwd: UNFI Deductions Weekly Status Update for UNFI Remit #56445
subject: UNFI Deductions Weekly Status Update for UNFI Remit #56445
preview: Good Day, Attached is your Natural Deductions Dispute Weekly Status Update Report. This report is issued to keep our Suppliers up-to-date on
body:
Good Day,
Attached is your Natural Deductions Dispute Weekly Status Update Report.  This report is issued to keep our Suppliers up-to-date on the resolution of their formal disputes. This report provides Dispute Status, Dispute Resolution, Date Closed, Repayment Check # and Amount repaid if applicable; as well as A Invoice* information (*A Invoice: meaning an amended invoice was created for misshipped items or POs received short in error by our Warehouse). 

ALL of the below are now managed by our AP Department. These disputes will not be displayed on this report, nor will they receive a Tracking number from the Supplier Deduction Dispute Management Team. 
  • East & West Short Payments (meaning NO deduction was taken, the invoice was paid for less than was invoiced, etc.) 
  • East & West Prepaid Payments (invoices ending in PP) 
  •  East & West Cash Term/Payment Disputes 
  •  East & West Unpaid Invoices 
    Report Update We have updated the status information to help you better determine where your dispute is in the process, you will now see: 
    Dispute Received: for disputes that have been received but have not moved into research process 
    In Process of Being Reviewed: for disputes that are currently being researched. 
    Research Completed - Repayment Pending Approval: for disputes that have been researched and are being reviewed for accuracy of resolution. 
    Referred to AP for Resolution: for disputes that fall under our Accounts Payable Department for resolution. 
    Research Completed - New Invoice Requested: we are unable to use the documentation either received or on hand to complete a repayment and have requested you submit a new invoice for payment. 
    Repayment Approved: for disputes that have been approved for repayment, and 
    Research Completed - Repayment Denied: for disputes that have been denied repayment 

    You will also notice the following under check# and A Inv Repay CK#: 

    'UNPAID on Account' these are repayments that have been approved by the Supplier Deduction Dispute Resolution Team, but as of the date of this report the repayment has not been released to an outgoing payment to the Supplier. '(CK#)-Zero Check' these are repayments that have been approved by the Supplier Deduction Dispute Resolution Team and are on your AP account, but a check was not released by our AP Department. Please contact your AP Rep directly for further assistance on any Unpaid on Account or Zero Check payments. 

    We thank you for your continued patience and understanding as we strive to provide you with the most current information we have on your disputes, and to continue making progress with communications to you. If you have any questions, please email SupplierDeductionDisputeMgmt@unfi.com 

    Supplier Deduction Dispute Mgmt - Supplier Services 
    We continue to work outside of the office, please send all correspondence or questions to SupplierDeductionDisputeMgmt@unfi.com. 
    www.unfi.com
